item.title: Brighton Representing - No place for Fascists in Britain
item.dc:creator: TomatoAndBasil

item.title: Why some people taste soap when eating coriander (cilantro)
item.description: Lieven Scheire, quite famous in Belgium. From his show 'DNA': https://youtu.be/HAbybR9BZBE?si=epMe1afrxgp9zhdY Additional info: https://flavourjournal.biomedcentral.com/articles/10.1186/2044-7248-1-22 (2012) "These results confirm that there is a genetic component to cilantro taste perception and suggest that cilantro dislike may stem from genetic variants in olfactory receptors. We propose that one of a cluster of olfactory receptor genes, perhaps OR6A2, may be the olfactory receptor that contributes to the detection of a soapy smell from cilantro in European populations." https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7206992/ (2020) "Scientists found most coriander haters to have a common olfactory receptor gene called OR6A2, which absorbs the odour of aldehyde chemicals (Eriksson et al., 2012). Flavour chemists discovered that coriander aroma is produced by about six substances, most of which are aldehydes. Those who do not like the taste are sensitive to harmful unsaturated aldehydes, while those not able to detect aromatic chemicals find it pleasant. To avoid the soapy taste, the coriander haters can often eat parsley instead of coriander."
item.dc:creator: isthatgrandma

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i'm not actually a lizard, just like the pic
a regular childhood occurrence
i feel like it would be weird
there goes my business venture
this book was severely disappointing
sorry gang
that bed must feel so horrible
??
they should be in more horror movies
seriously it looks amazing
you'd be an idiot to not buy this
is there some other meaning for bdsm?
wait what
since there was a parrot earlier in the dump, yes.. i did
dang
no one cares
especially you, barry
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Fontana Luminosa ("luminous fountain")
item.description: In the Italian town of L'Aquila there is an unusual fountain. The sun's rays passing through this fountain give the impression that fiery lava is pouring out of it. I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk at some point today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Splash 1984

item.title: Anyway, wish me luck friends!!!!
item.description:
My reaction!!
Another reaction.
And another….
Also me.
Me to my niece: I started Menopause. My niece: What’s menopause? Me: It’s when your period starts to stop cause it stops eventually. Me niece’s reaction to hearing that it stops eventually:
Then I told her how not fun the process can be and that mine is hurting like a mofo and I need to see a specialist now cause my skin is cracking open and flared up. Her new reaction:
Send help!! Lol
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: A life of regrets.
item.description: I used to live for the gang I was in. I deserved what I got. I hurt a lot of people in life and live with daily regret people have PTSD and low quality of life because of me. Talking to people with LWOP sentences put some sense in my head. I have since walked away from said gang and work at a nonprofit helping people get housing off the streets. I still don't think I'm giving back enough. It haunts me. I have done some terrible stuff on the yard enforcng rules doing "removals" which is the act of beating someone near to death and even stabbing sex offenders. I have witnessed people killed multiple times. I should have done less time, but these acts gave me more time. I can't seem to shake it. I walk around in public like a hard ass and am always ready for combat looking over my shoulder. My partner makes fun of me for wearing clothes to bed to be ready. I work out religiously. I just can't stop replaying it. I never smile and hardly laugh. A good deal of my fear is running into the gang I dropped out of as well. I'm also a little weird from so much isolation in the SHU. I have been to several doctors and done a ton of mindfulness with no help. Guess I'm a lost soul.
item.dc:creator: MegatronTheDecepticon

item.title: Bottom Shelf Memesssssssss
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
This is only about half of the cursed foods we will be eating live tonight (August 7, 2024) at 9:30 PM CST on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Somebody mailed us bugs...so catch pop in and heckle us and watch me cry live on stream.
Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Smiley Hiley tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Sarah's Golden Smile after Winning Gold. :)
item.description: American wrestler Sarah Hildebrandt breaks through to win Olympic gold after falling short in 2020 “I love this sport,” Hildebrandt said after the win. “It’s so much fun. I’m going to smile as much as I can. I think I did a great job of that this week.” Known for her signature smile after matches, Hildebrandt’s exuberance after her victory was undeniable as she became the second member of the United States wrestling team to win gold after 20-year-old Amit Elor was the first on Tuesday at 68kg. https://www.mmafighting.com/2024/8/7/24215609/american-wrestler-sarah-hildebrandt-breaks-through-to-win-olympic-gold-medal-after-2020-bronze #olympics
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1087 (human-like behavior)
item.description:
Good morning. I actually slept sorta well, despite waking up in the middle of a dream, so the world will find me especially problematic today. Let's get this bread.
I mean, I did get some anxiety in too. But the message of the dream was when someone offers me help, I should take it.
Especially hilarious because unlike some of my coworkers who also dress like cowboys, I carry a giant bowie knife instead of a gun. The knife is more useful for adjusting mirrors, anyway.
Gotta love a good Civ VI meme.
It's okay to seek help if you're contemplating suicide. People do love and care about you. Get help. The world would suck without your Meme posts. Survive, please.
Oops this is here twice
My coffee today is light roast, fair-trade, locally roasted coffee sourced from Rwanda and it is magical and delicious.
Elf is how you say 11 in German.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning! Hey cutie! WHATDOIN?"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: Idiot driver
item.description: My original post of this video on July 21 was taken down for allegedly violating Community Guidelines, but today Imgur told me that was a mistake and I hadn't done anything wrong, so I'm reposting it. Sadly, neither the highway patrol nor local police followed up on the 911 call we made, so this clown didn't face any consequences for his reckless & aggressive driving :(

item.title: Revealed: The moment furious Putin is told 1,000 Ukrainian soldiers have crossed Russian border in audacious surprise assault as stony-faced Vladimir stares at military commander
item.description:
This is the moment a furious Vladimir Putin was told that 1,000 Ukrainian soldiers had fought their way 'deep' inside Russian territory for the first time in the war. Earlier today, Putin declared that Ukraine carried out a 'large-scale provocation' following a daring surprise assault on Russia's border region of Kursk, which saw thousands evacuated. Now, it has been revealed by Russia's chief of the general staff General Valery Gerasimov that 1,000 troops of the Armed Forces of Ukraine went on the offensive to seize a section of territory in the Sudzhinsky district of Kursk. In an emergency meeting with the Russian Security Council, a frustrated Putin can be heard asking his colleagues to report on the situation in Kursk. General Gerasimov - speaking by video from an operational control point - had the unenviable task of describing the Ukrainian soldier's advances before claiming with little evidence that the surprise thrust had been stopped. https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-13719415/Moment-furious-Putin-told-1-000-Ukrainian-soldiers-crossed-Russian-border.html
Last time we ever see this guy??
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
